problem id: 6deb3d5e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10110010 -> 00110110
  01000110 -> 01101000
  01101111 -> 11111101
  11111111 -> 11101111
  01100100 -> 01001100
  10001000 -> 10010001
  00011111 -> 11110011
  00001001 -> 10010001
  00100100 -> 01000100
  10111001 -> 10000111

query: 10011101
predicted answer: 11000011
